Thank you. Does that help? Yes. Okay. If
you're a business owner and you are not
growing as fast as you'd like, I'd like
to give you a free gift. So my team and
I put together the $100 million scaling
roadmap which is basically 200 hours of
us looking over all the portfolio
companies we've had and what stages of
growth they went through and more
importantly where they got stuck and how
they got past it. And so we broke it
into these 10 stages and we made a quiz

what to do for each of functions of the
business across product, marketing,

someone else has already struggled with
